creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
Created attachment 174194
Diffs for ports files (including patches)

This upgrades lang/rexx-regina from 3.8.2-1 to 3.9.1.

I wish to claim maintainership for this port.

In addition:
- Makefile tidied, and passes portlint -C.
- rc.d file corrected; now passes rclint.
- Port now installs documentation (PDF), not previously included.
- Added DOCS option, controlling installation of above.
- Files in /usr/local/share now in directories that actually match the
  name of the port.

A number of new patch files are included:

files/patch-Makefile.in
files/patch-builtin.c
files/patch-files.c
files/patch-options.c
files/patch-regutil_inifile.c
files/patch-regutil_regfilesys.c
files/patch-regutil_regini.c
files/patch-regutil_regmacrospace.c
files/patch-regutil_regscreenux.c
files/patch-regutil_regtrig.c
files/patch-regutil_regunicode.c
files/patch-regutil_regutil.c
files/patch-rxstack.c
files/patch-strmath.c
